description_long: This is a modern, multi-tiered round coffee table featuring three overlapping circular wooden surfaces at different heights. The tabletops are made of a rich, dark wood with a visible grain pattern, giving the piece a warm and natural appearance. The support structure consists of three black metal rings at the base, each corresponding to a tabletop, connected by vertical metal rods. The design is open and geometric, with negative space between the tiers and bases, creating a visually light and airy effect. The table's construction suggests durability and stability, while the staggered arrangement of the surfaces offers versatile functionality for placing items at different levels. This table would be a striking centerpiece in a contemporary urban living space, lobby, or stylish café.
description: A modern, multi-tiered round coffee table with three overlapping wooden surfaces and black metal ring bases, offering a geometric and airy design.
description_view_0: Three circular wooden tabletops are visible, staggered at different heights, with black metal ring bases partially visible beneath.
description_view_1: The table is viewed head-on, showing two main wooden surfaces aligned vertically and the black metal ring base directly below.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, but the staggered arrangement of the three wooden surfaces is more pronounced, with the metal bases clearly visible.
description_view_3: A frontal view showing two main wooden surfaces stacked vertically, with the black metal ring base centered below.
